payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Vertical rectangular picture frame with a narrow dark wood profile surrounding a white matted print containing black printed/handwritten text; frame appears intact and fully visible in the crop, image is slightly low-resolution/blurred — estimated ~1.5 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"dark wood rectangular framed print","long_description":"Vertical rectangular picture frame with a narrow dark wood profile surrounding a white matted print containing black printed/handwritten text; frame appears intact and fully visible in the crop, image is slightly low-resolution/blurred — estimated ~1.5 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark wood frame","rectangular vertical orientation","white matte/background","black printed/handwritten text","narrow frame profile","small-to-medium size","slightly blurred / low resolution","fully visible (not edge-cropped)"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
